steps.title: Rewrite the inequality for y
steps.content: Start with $2x-y>883$. Subtract $2x$ from both sides: $$-y>883-2x.$$ Divide by $-1$ and reverse the inequality: $$y\lt2x-883.$$

steps.title: Find the needed y-values
steps.content: For the three $x$-values in the tables: when $x=440$, $y\lt-3$; when $x=441$, $y\lt-1$; and when $x=442$, $y\lt1$.

steps.title: Identify the table
steps.content: Choice D pairs $440$ with $-4$, $441$ with $-2$, and $442$ with $0$. Each value is below the required cutoff for its row, so all three ordered pairs satisfy the inequality. That is enough because the question asks which table consists only of solutions. Choice D is correct.
